nodes.itemHTML: • Quantum Mechanics by PBS Space Time - YouTube playlist targeting a wide audience with generic concepts around Quantum Mechanics and Computing.
• Programming a Quantum Computer with Qiskit - 2-hour guided course focusing on learning how to code for a Quantum Computer leveraging Qiskit.
• Upstash — Serverless Redis with free tier up to 10,000 requests per day, 256MB max database size, and 20 concurrent connections
• GDPR Today - Privacy news from the Open Rights Group.
• Spread Privacy - DuckDuckGo Blog.
• Freedom To Tinker - Blog from Princeton's CITP, a research center that studies digital technologies in public life.
• pdpEcho - All about personal data protection and privacy, by Gabriela Zanfir-Fortuna.
• GDPRhub - Free and open wiki that allows anyone to find and share GDPR insights across Europe.
• CNIL - GDPR Developer Guidestars207
• Norwegian DPA - Software development with Data Protection by Design and by Default
• Website Evidence Collector (WEC)stars119 - EDPS Inspection Software.
• Hello, world: The Fargate/Terraform tutorial I wish I had - Blog post describing setting up an ECS Fargate cluster from scratch
• libqrencode Wstars1.8k - A fast and compact library for encoding data in a QR code symbol.
• QR-Code-generator Wstars1.9k - High-quality QR code generator library in Java, TypeScript/JavaScript, Python, C++, C, Rust.
• Qart Wstars998 - An app to merge a picture and a QR code.
• instascan Rstars2.5k - HTML5 QR code scanner using your webcam.
• qrious Wstars1.2k - Pure JavaScript library for QR code generation using canvas.
• jsQR Rstars2.4k - A pure JavaScript QR code reading library.
• qrcode.react Wstars2.4k - A <QRCode/> component for use with React.
• react-native-qrcode-scanner Rstars1.6k - A QR code scanner component for React Native.
• vue-qrcode-reader Rstars1.3k - A set of Vue.js components for detecting and decoding QR codes.
• sylnsfar/qrcode Wstars8.1k - Artistic QR code in Python (can produce GIFs).
• SGQRCode Rstars1.5k - Easy to use QR code scan library for iOS.
• EFQRCode Wstars4k - A better way to operate QR code in Swift, support iOS, macOS, watchOS and tvOS.
• QRCoder Wstars2.4k - A pure C# Open Source QR code implementation.
• BGAQRCode-Android RWstars7.2k - QR code reader and generator written in C.
• AwesomeQRCode (Kotlin) Wstars1.6k - An awesome QR code generator for Android (can produce GIFs).
• php-qrcode-detector-decoder Rstars1.1k - PHP library to detect and decode QR codes.
• simple-qrcode Wstars1.7k - An easy-to-use PHP QR code generator.
• endroid/qr-code Wstars3.2k - QR code generator.
• BaconQRCode Wstars1.2k - QR code generator for PHP.
• default_rails_templatestars15 - Default template for generating new Rails applications.
• docker-Rails-Templatestars67 - A freshly updated version of "rails new", preconfigured to be run with Docker.
• docker-railsstars874
• jumpstart(excid3)stars822 - Easily jumpstart a new Rails application with a bunch of great features by default.
• jumpstart(thomasvanholder)stars12 - Template for set-up of Rails 6, Tailwind 2.0 and Devise.
• kickoff_tailwindstars302 - A rapid Rails 6 application template for personal use bundled with Tailwind CSS.
• rails-devise-graphqlstars216 - A Rails 6 boilerplate to create your next Saas product. Preloaded with graphQL, devise, JWT, CanCanCan, RailsAdmin, Rubocop, Rspec, and more.
• rails-template(mattbrictson)stars780 - Application template for Rails 6 projects; preloaded with best practices for TDD, security, deployment, and developer productivity.
• rails-template(TristanToye)stars20 - MVP Ready Rails - A Template for Your Next Rails App
• rails-template(ackama)stars16 - Application template for Rails 6.1 projects; preloaded with best practices for TDD, security, deployment, and developer productivity.
• rails-template(astrocket)stars49 - Template for Rails 6.0 + Kubernetes + Webpacker + Stimulus + TailwindCSS + Let's Encrypt.
• rails-template(dao42)stars371 - A best & newest & fastest rails 6.x template for senior rails developer.
• rails-templates(lewagon)stars433 - Jump start your Rails development with Le Wagon best practices.
• rails-templates(nimblehq)stars38 - Our optimized Rails templates used in our projects.
• rails-vue-templatestars19 - An example of how to use VueJS as a single page application inside Rails using Webpacker.
• suspendersstars3.7k - A Rails template with our standard defaults, ready to deploy to Heroku.
• vuejs-rails-starterkitstars207 - Vue.js + Rails Starting Kit GitHub Template to develop Hybrid Mobile Application.
• revenuecat.com — Hosted backend for in-app purchases and subscriptions (iOS and Android). Free up to $10k/mo in tracked revenue.
• Kreya — Free gRPC GUI client to call and test gRPC APIs. Can import gRPC APIs via server reflection.

• Hook Relay - Add webhook support to your app without the hassles: done-for-you queueing, retries with backoff, and logging. The free plan has 100 deliveries per day, 14-day retention, and 3 hook endpoints.
• honeybadger.io - Exception, uptime, and cron monitoring. Free for small teams and open-source projects (12,000 errors/month).
• vdotenvstars11 - Support for .env files which loads environment variables.
• viscordstars17 - Pretty basic library for connecting to the Discord gateway.
• discord.vstars43 - User-friendly Discord bot library.
• MeisterTask — Online task management for teams. Free up to 3 projects, unlimited project members.
• Braid — Chat app designed for teams. Free for public access group, unlimited users, history, and integrations. also it provide self-hostable open-source version.
• Zulip — Real-time chat with unique email-like threading model. Free plan includes 10,000 messages of search history and File storage up to 5 GB. also it provides self-hostable open-source version.
• heptapod.net — Heptapod is a friendly fork of GitLab Community Edition providing support for Mercurial
• teamwork.com — Project management & Team Chat. Free for 5 users and 2 projects. Premium plans available.
• Yodiz — Agile development and issue tracking. Free up to 3 users, unlimited projects.
• Fibery — Connected workspace platform. Free for single user, up to 2 GB disk space.
• Tara AI — Simple sprint management service. Free plan has unlimited tasks, sprints and workspaces, with no user limits.
• Linear — Issue tracker with streamlined interface. Free for unlimited members, up to 10MB file upload size, 250 issues (excluding Archive)
• SeaTable — Flexible, Spreadsheet-like Database built by Seafile team. unlimited tables, 2,000 lines, 1-month versioning, up to 25 team members.
• ContainDS Dashboardsstars102 - JupyterHub extension to host authenticated scripts or notebooks in any framework (Voilà, Streamlit, Plotly Dash etc).
• holistic.dev - The #1 static code analyzer for Postgresql optimization. Performance, security, and architect database issues automatic detection service
• parsers.dev - Abstract syntax tree parsers and intermediate representation compilers as a service

• Avo — Simplified analytics release workflow. Single-source-of-truth tracking plan, type safe analytics tracking library, in-app debuggers, data observability to catch all data issues before you release. Free for 2 workspace members and 1 hour data observability lookback.
• 3v4l - Free online PHP shell and snippet sharing site, runs your code in 300+ PHP versions
• Blazor Train: Options for Mobile Apps - February 19, 2021 - Carl Franklin welcomes back Microsoft’s Dan Roth to discuss options for building mobile apps with Blazor.
• Blazor Layout Components - February 22, 2021 - Blazor Layout Components, by Ed Charbeneau.
• Canvas Cheatsheet - Quick and visual canvas cheatsheet.

Calendaring and Contacts Management

CalDAV or CardDAV servers
nodes.itemHTML: • Etebase (EteSync) - End-to-end encrypted and journaled personal information server supporting calendar and contact data, offering its own clients. (Source Codestars861) AGPL-3.0 Python/Django
• How Web Components Are Used at GitHub and Salesforce
• ploi.io - Server management tool to easily manage and deploy your servers & sites. Free for 1 server.
• Mijinstars23 - Responsive Tailwind CSS UI components, without dependencies
• thundra.io/apm — Application monitoring and debugging. Has a free tier up to 250k monthly invocations.
• Octopus Deploy - Automated deployment and release-management. Free for <= 10 deployment targets.
• Doppler — Universal Secrets Manager for application secrets and config, with support for syncing to various cloud providers. Free for unlimited users with basic access controls.

• ipapi - IP Address Location API by Kloudend, Inc - A reliable geolocation API, built on AWS, trusted by Fortune 500. Free tier offers 30k lookups/month (1k/day) without signup. Contact us for a higher limit trial plan.

• developers.arcgis.com — APIs and SDKs for maps, geospatial data storage, analysis, geocoding, routing, and more across web, desktop, and mobile. 2,000,000 free basemap tiles, 20,000 non-stored geocodes, 20,000 simple routes, 5,000 drive time calculations, 5GB free tile+data storage per month.
• nbshare - Data Science notebooks

• newrelic.com — New Relic observability platform built to help engineers create more perfect software. From monoliths to serverless, you can instrument everything, then analyze, troubleshoot, and optimize your entire software stack. Free tier offers 100GB/month of free data ingest, 1 free full access user, and unlimited free basic users.

• cloudinary.com — Image upload, powerful manipulations, storage and delivery for sites and apps, with libraries for Ruby, Python, Java, PHP, Objective-C and more. Free tier includes 25 monthly credits. 1 credit is equal to 1,000 image transformations, 1 GB of storage, or 1 GB of CDN usage.
• wormhol.org — Straightforward file sharing service. Share unlimited files up to 5GB to as many peers as you want.
• LogRocket.com - 1,000 sessions/month with 30 day retention, error tracking, live mode
• Cmd — Security platform providing real-time access control and dynamic policy enforcement on every Linux instance in your cloud or datacenter
• slackstars3.5k - Slack API in Go.
• SimpleLocalize - Free up to 100 translation keys, unlimited strings, unlimited languages, startup deals
